title: quercus indica
intro: Quercus indica, also known as the Indian laurel or sal tree, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains tannins and flavonoids that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus indica include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Quercus indica can be prepared into herbal remedies like tea, powder, or extract, which are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
